app.name: SaúdeFoz
app.tagline: Access Brazil's public health system (SUS) in Foz do Iguaçu. Official information in your language.
app.disclaimer: For guidance only. Does not replace medical care. Emergency: call SAMU 192.

section.ptNoticeBody: This content comes from Brazil's Ministry of Health and is in Portuguese. Use the translate button to read it in your language.

ubs.noResults: No results found. Try a different term.

about.title: About SaúdeFoz
about.paragraph1: SaúdeFoz is a non-profit project that helps immigrants in Foz do Iguaçu and the Triple Frontier region access Brazil's Unified Health System (SUS).
about.paragraph2: All information comes from official sources at Brazil's Ministry of Health (gov.br) and is updated automatically every week.
about.paragraph3: This project has no official affiliation with the Brazilian government or any health institution.
about.disclaimerBody: This website is for information only. It does not replace professional medical care. In an emergency, call SAMU 192 or go to the nearest UPA.
